dob_prompt: Please enter your date of birth above to get started.
dob_prompt_testdate: Please enter the date of your test above to get started.
dob_prompt_both: Please enter your date of birth and test date above to get started.
dob_prompt_error_dob: Please enter your date of birth to calculate your biological age.
dob_prompt_error_testdate: Please enter your test date to calculate your biological age.
dob_prompt_error_both: Please enter your date of birth and test date to calculate your biological age.
legacy_note: Your test results were loaded from an older version of this calculator which stored your age directly. Please enter your date of birth and the date of the test so we can calculate your age more accurately.
error_test_date_after_dob: Must be after date of birth
error_test_date_after_dob_detail: Test date must be after date of birth
error_age_out_of_range: Calculated age ({0}) is out of range
error_calculation_failed: Could not calculate result. Please check your inputs.
error_config_failed: Error loading calculator configuration. Please try refreshing the page.
prompt_enter_all_values: Please enter all values above to calculate your biological age.
range_implausible: Are the value and units correct? {0} is typically {1}–{2} {3}.
range_warning: {0} is typically {1}–{2} {3}. Your result may still be valid if this value is correct.
result_summary: Your chronological age at the test date was {0} years, and your calculated biological age was {1} years, which means that your risk of death from age-related causes in the coming year is approximately {2}%, or around 1 in {3}.
result_summary_low_risk: Your chronological age at the test date was {0} years, and your calculated biological age was {1} years, which means that your risk of death from age-related causes in the coming year is less than 0.1%, or around 1 in {2}.
defaults_warning_one: This result is approximate: one value is a population average.
defaults_warning_few: This result is approximate: {0} of {1} values are population averages.
defaults_warning_very: This result is very approximate: {0} of {1} values are population averages.
defaults_warning_extreme: This result is extremely approximate: {0} of {1} values are population averages. Please enter more of your own blood test results to get a meaningful biological age estimate.
defaults_warning_all: This result is entirely based on population averages! Please enter some of your own blood test results to get a meaningful biological age estimate.
result_implausible_warning_one: The value for {0} looks implausible. Please check it and the selected units before relying on this result.
result_implausible_warning_many: The values for {0} look implausible. Please check them and the selected units before relying on this result.
save_link_label: Result link (contains your blood test values—share with care):
save_upload_no_data: No compatible data found in this file. Please use a CSV exported from this calculator.
save_csv_note: Downloads your results as a small spreadsheet file that can be opened with Microsoft Excel, LibreOffice Calc, or Google Sheets. The downloaded file can be read by anyone who uses this computer.
save_browser_warning: Results are saved in this browser only. Don’t use this on a shared or public computer.
save_privacy_note: The link above contains your blood test results, which are private medical data. With this many data points your medical record could likely be uniquely identified.
share_image_note: This image only shows your biological age result, not your blood test values.
share_native_text: Check out my biological age result!
card_aria_label: Biological age result card: biological age {0}, chronological age {1}, {2}
defaults_button: Fill missing values with population averages for my age
defaults_note: Uses median values from the NHANES III population study for your age.
defaults_need_dates: Please enter your date of birth and test date first.
storage_restored: Your previous values were restored from this browser’s storage.
